title: WorldFlex VFX Rules
description: Batch binding rules consumed by the WorldFlexVFXBind commandlet (-Rules=...). Speeds are component-space cm/s.

track.description: Default Notify track name for all bindings.

remove_existing.description: Default: clear existing events on the track before writing.

anim.description: UE object path of the Animation Sequence, e.g. /Game/.../Mma_Kick.Mma_Kick

mesh.description: Optional UE object path of the preview Skeletal Mesh.

events_json.description: Optional output path for detected events JSON. Relative paths resolve against the rules file directory.

bone.description: Bone name used for detection and as Notify SocketName.

niagara.description: UE object path of the Niagara System.

speed_threshold.description: Component-space speed threshold in cm/s. Calibrate using max/mean/suggested_threshold in bind_report.json.

min_duration.description: Minimum trail duration in seconds (speed_trail / run_loop).

offset_after_peak.description: Seconds after the speed peak to place the impact event (speed_peak_impact).

horizontal_only.description: Measure horizontal (XY) speed only. run_loop rules default to true.
